description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script to set up the Ruby environment by executing ./scripts/prepare_build.sh, then ruby -v, which ruby, gem install bundler --no-document, and bundle install --jobs $(nproc). Define a job named test that runs in the default test stage and executes the command bundle exec rake test. No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined, so the pipeline uses the runner's default image and runs on all branches.
